name: Jay Leno
blurb: After years as a touring stand-up and frequent guest on late-night television, he succeeded Johnny Carson as Tonight Show host in 1992, a post he held into 2014.
bio: Jay Leno is an American comedian and television host known for his blue-collar, observational stand-up and his long tenure hosting NBCs The Tonight Show. After years as a touring stand-up and frequent guest on late-night television, he succeeded Johnny Carson as Tonight Show host in 1992, a post he held into 2014. He has continued to perform stand-up extensively throughout his career.

timeline.ev: First appearance on The Tonight Show Starring Johnny Carson
Becomes a regular substitute host for Johnny Carson
Succeeds Carson as host of The Tonight Show
Returns to host The Tonight Show after the late-night conflict
Hosts final Tonight Show episode; inducted into the Television Hall of Fame

accolades: Inducted into the Television Hall of Fame (2014)
Tonight Show with Jay Leno won four Primetime Emmy Awards
Mark Twain Prize for American Humor recipient

specials.t: Jay Leno and the American Dream
